name: pr-body-scope-bot-actor-exemption
title: Exempt automated PR authors from pr-body-scope check
description: pr-body-scope.py fails every Dependabot/Renovate PR (bodies lack human scope headings), blocking their auto-merge; add a bot-actor exemption via --actor / SD_AI_COMMAND_PACK_PR_BODY_SCOPE_ACTOR so [bot] logins skip strict validation.
creator: sdelmas
